title: AI Full Stack Developer - Fully Remote Opportunity
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a highly experienced AI Full Stack Developer
with deep expertise in architecting and building enterprise-
grade Generative AI, Agentic AI, and full-stack
applications. The ideal candidate will have hands-on
experience implementing LLM-powered platforms, RAG
pipelines, AI agent frameworks, and cloud-native
microservices using Azure, AWS, and modern full-stack
technologies.

This role requires a developer who can seamlessly merge AI
engineering, backend/frontend development, cloud
architecture, and data engineering to deliver intelligent,
scalable, and secure solutions.

Required Skills & Experience

Technical Expertise

• 10+ years of full-stack development using .NET, C#,
Python, Node.js, Angular, React.

• Strong hands-on experience with Generative AI, LLMs, RAG,
AI Agent frameworks, and vector search.

• Mastery in cloud engineering—especially Azure AI Foundry,
Azure OpenAI, Azure ML.

 • Experience building CI/CD, DevSecOps, and secure cloud
infrastructures.

• Proficiency in relational and NoSQL databases (SQL Server,
PostgreSQL, Oracle, MySQL, MongoDB, Cosmos DB).

AI/ML Tools & Frameworks

• Azure Cognitive Services • Azure AI Search • Hugging Face
• LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Semantic Kernel • TensorFlow,
PyTorch, Keras
responsibilities: Architect and build enterprise-grade Generative AI and Agentic AI applications
Implement LLM-powered platforms and RAG pipelines
Develop AI agent frameworks using LangChain, CrewAI, and AutoGen
Build cloud-native microservices using Azure and AWS
Design and implement full-stack applications with .NET, Python, and Node.js
Create and manage CI/CD pipelines and secure cloud infrastructures
Work with vector search and AI/ML tools and frameworks
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role requires hands-on implementation of LLM-powered
platforms, RAG pipelines, and AI agent frameworks. The
developer will directly build and deploy Generative AI and
Agentic AI systems, working with models and AI frameworks as
a core responsibility.
